name: Go SRT Filter Strainer Set (50 pcs.)
summary: Go SRT Filter Strainer Set (50 pcs.) — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Go SRT Filter Strainer Set includes 50 original Arizer replacement screens for the Arizer Go SRT, designed to maintain clean airflow and effective filtration within the air and material path. As the mouthpieces do not include integrated filters, these stainless steel strainers are essential for reducing particles and ensuring consistent performance. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
